title: McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: Highlights of the August 4 EIFEL Rules and Canada's Pillar 2 Proposals - Montréal
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: Highlights of the August 4 EIFEL Rules and Canada's Pillar 2 Proposals - Montréal
Join us for an interactive discussion about the important features of the latest draft of the EIFEL rules and Canada’s proposed legislation to implement Pillar 2.
We will highlight the changes to the EIFEL rules contained in the August 4 proposals as compared to previous drafts and will discuss some of the anticipated challenges and opportunities for taxpayers. On Pillar 2, we will provide a brief overview of Canada’s version of the rules, our predictions regarding the issues that may arise, and will discuss some planning opportunities as well as potential pitfalls and uncertainties.
The presentation will be followed by a cocktail reception.
- Marie-Soleil Landry , Partner, National Tax Group, McCarthy Tétrault
- Christian Meighen , Partner, National Tax Group, McCarthy Tétrault
For questions about this event, please contact montrealevents@mccarthy.ca .
Mandatory continuing education for Quebec CPAs: This program is equivalent to 1.5 hours of content. You can find more information on the continuing education requirements for Quebec CPAs here .
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
Note: The presentation will be offered in French only and will take place in our Montreal office
Time (ET): 3:45 p.m. – Registration 4:00 p.m. – Presentation 5:30 p.m. – Cocktail Reception
- Marie-Soleil Landry Partner | Tax Group Regional Practice Lead - Montréal People.Offices.Singular Montréal
